title: Account setup revamp
summary: Does a shorter setup flow increase wizard completion? No, it didn't.
hypothesis: This experiment creates a new account setup experiment for 50% of new signups. This account setup flow is designed to be shorter, more aesthetically pleasing, and delightful to use. We are also adding a new step prompting the user to confirm their branding, which is optional. We believe this will lead to earlier personalization and better overall activation.
results: Treatment failed to meaningfully outperform control. Decision: ship control group. New branding experience showed a 10%+ conversion increase vs. legacy branding flow.
learning: Mobile responsiveness was a critical issue — shrunken components and partially hidden navigation made it hard to progress on mobile. The new branding experience showed promise and has been shipped to all users independently.
notes:
5 design screenshots attached in the Slack thread. Industry data no longer collected as a step in setup — gathered via BuiltWith in background and classified by DS model (CompanyWebsiteAnalysis table).

Mobile responsiveness is critical.
• Shrunken components on mobile made data input and progressing to next steps incredibly hard.
• Partially hidden navigation left mobile users unable to progress through setup for a period of the experiment.
• Responsiveness can no longer be an afterthought, and needs to be part of solution design.

Delight without utility creates friction.
• The colorful side panel was intended to create a more engaging experience, but the data suggests it distracted/confused/overwhelmed users rather than help/motivate them to move forward.
• 'Delightful' additions need to earn their place by being directly helpful.

AI fallbacks are non-negotiable.
• Parts of the experience relied on AI-generated content without graceful fallbacks for long wait periods or failure states.
• When AI was unavailable or underperforming, users hit semi-dead ends. Any AI-dependent feature needs a reliable fallback before it ships.
treatment_description: New /setup-account flow with streamlined steps and brand onboarding experience
